name: Blackberry and Apple Crumble Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, core and slice cooking apples and place in a pan with blackberries, sugar, lemon juice and rind and cold water. Simmer gently for 10 minutes until the fruit is just softened.
2. Add arrowroot mixture and stir until thickened. Cool.
3. To make the base and topping, blend together butter and sugar in a processor until soft and fluffy. Add beaten egg, baking powder, ground almonds, flour and ground cinnamon and process until just crumbly. Turn mixture into a bowl.
4. Grease and line a 23 cm springform pan. Turn out 2/3 of the crumble mixture onto a floured surface and gently knead together to combine. Use to cover base of prepared pan, simply pushing any cracks together.
5. Spread cooled blackberry and apple mixture over base. Sprinkle reserved crumble mixture evenly over fruit topping and decorate with whole almonds.
6. Bake at 350°F for 50 minutes until pale golden.
7. Serve warm or cold.
